videos.title: Full review: is it worth it?
videos.author: GadgetLab

reviews.author: Marco V.
reviews.title: Absolutely stunning lamp – worth every cent
reviews.body: I've had the UFO SpaceBlue for three months now and it still blows people away every single time. The mechanism is buttery smooth and the SpaceBlue color is exactly as shown. Battery life is fantastic — three 18650s last a full weekend camping trip. Assembly was simple even without instructions, which says a lot.

reviews.author: Sarah K.
reviews.title: The reaction at my dinner party said everything
reviews.body: Guests literally stopped mid-conversation when I raised this lamp. It's not just a light — it's a conversation piece. The SpaceBlue finish is deep and beautiful. Shipping was fast and packaging was excellent.

reviews.author: Thomas B.
reviews.title: Great product, minor improvement possible
reviews.body: Really impressive engineering. The rising motion is satisfying every time. I give 4 stars only because I wish the carrying case were included. The lamp itself is perfect — solid, bright, and elegant. Already ordered a second one for a gift.

reviews.author: Lena H.
reviews.title: My kids are obsessed
reviews.body: We use this every evening on the back porch. My children love operating it and guests always ask where we got it. The color holds up after months of outdoor use. Customer service was also responsive when I had a question.

reviews.author: Pieter M.
reviews.title: Pre-order was totally worth the wait
reviews.body: I was a bit nervous ordering a pre-order item but the communication was great throughout. The lamp arrived perfectly packaged and the SpaceBlue color is even more impressive in person. The mechanism feels premium — not a single creak or wobble.
